title: koanophyllon juninense
intro: Koanophyllon juninense is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the Junin daisy. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which have been traditionally used in folk medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Koanophyllon juninense include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and extracts, which are believed to enhance its medicinal effects.
